title: Menus - Managing and arranging menus (incl. sub-menus)
workflow_title: Menus - Managing and arranging menus (incl. sub-menus)

steps.caption: Under a product group, click Add submenu to create a new submenu.
Choose a colour for the submenu (used in the app) and optionally + Upload image.
To add products, select them in the right column and drag them into the submenu.
Use the pencil icon to rename a submenu, or the trash icon to delete it (this cannot be undone).
To add an extra menu, click Add menu at the top right.
Link the menu to a location, for example an area, table or restaurant.
Then go to General, the sub-category General, and click Send to push the changes to your POS.
